issues: Exercise 1 (La vallée de la Loire), first sentence is mis-transcribed: the image reads '...dans la douce vallée qui ___ (porter) (b) son nom. Elle ___ (traverser) (c)...' but the transcription fabricates extra text and misplaces the blank, rendering it as '...dans la douce vallée qui ___ la Loire. La Loire ___ (porter) (b) son nom. Elle ___ (traverser) (c)...'. The words 'la Loire. La Loire' do not appear in the image, and the (porter)(b) blank actually belongs to the relative clause 'qui ___ son nom', not to a separate 'La Loire ___ son nom' sentence.
